From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Estonian historian

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/44/Urmas_Dresen_2011.jpg/250px-Urmas_Dresen_2011.jpg)](/wiki/File:Urmas_Dresen_2011.jpg)

Urmas Dresen (2011)

**Urmas Dresen** (born in 1958) is an [Estonian](/wiki/Estonia "Estonia") historian.[[1]](#cite_note-meremuuseum.ee-1)

Since 1998 he is the head of [Estonian Maritime Museum](/wiki/Estonian_Maritime_Museum "Estonian Maritime Museum").[[1]](#cite_note-meremuuseum.ee-1)

In 2013, he was awarded with [Order of the White Star](/wiki/Order_of_the_White_Star "Order of the White Star"), IV class.[[2]](#cite_note-president.ee-2)
